sources: United Nations Economic Commission for Africa

items.headline: US and Iran exchange fire in Strait of Hormuz
items.body: American and Iranian forces exchanged missile and drone fire in the Strait of Hormuz. The clash tests a fragile ceasefire, raising risks for global oil shipping.

items.headline: African nations forge joint strategy on debt and climate finance
items.body: A sovereign finance forum concluded in Ethiopia on Friday. The meeting aimed to unify Africa's approach to debt relief and climate funding.

items.headline: Asian Development Bank launches $70 billion infrastructure plan
items.body: The bank announced a major energy and digital connectivity initiative for Asia. It aims to provide power and internet to hundreds of millions of people.
